Sheffield United / Sunderland
programme.desc: Retransmission of a 2nd Division of the England Championship, called EFL Championship. It is probably the most famous second level league in the world. Each year three teams are promoted to the Premier League.

programme.title: Be United
programme.desc: The Bein Sports Be united show gives the floor to sports enthusiasts who do not often have the floor, like people with disabilities.

programme.title: It happens on beIN SPORTS
programme.desc: It happens on Bein Sports is a condensed of sports news, results and best images of the last days: football, tennis, basketball, rugby, handball or US sports (NBA, MLB, NFL), all competitions are reviewed.

programme.title: Indiana Pacers / New York Knicks
programme.desc: Heroic in Game 4 by overthrowing 20 points behind to equalize in the series (100-106), the Knicks tackle this game 5 with the clear ambition to resume the advantage against Indiana. A new victory at the Gainbridge Fieldhouse would offer men from Tom Thibodeau a golden opportunity to return to a force at home. Worn by a decisive Karl-Anthony Towns in the Money Time (20 of his 24 points in the last quarter), a Jalen Brunson always as masterful at La Conde, and a duo Og Anunoby-Mikal Bridges collectively, the Knicks seem armed to respond in this capital turning point in the series. But the Pacers did not say their last word. At home, Indiana hopes to revive by relying on the address of Tyrese Haliburton, the experience of the 2019 champion Pascal Siakam and the interior impact of Myles Turner. A success would allow them to resume the psychological ascendant and to offer two match balls to win a place in the NBA final.

programme.title: Oklahoma City Thunder / Minnesota Timberwolves
programme.desc: By barely winning in Minneapolis during an unbreakable game 4 (128-126), the Thunder took control of the series (3-1) and can validate its ticket for the NBA finals in front of a boiling Paycc Center. A clear mission: to conclude at home and avoid a perilous return to Minnesota. Worn by a Shai Gilgeous-Alexander Imperial (40 pts, 10 assists), an unleashed Jalen Williams (34 pts, career record in playoffs) and an impassable Chet Holmgren in the racket, the men of Mark Daigneault have all the lights to strike a big blow. But beware of the Timberwolves start. Anthony Edwards, unrecognizable in Game 4 (16 pts), will have to find his edge to extend the adventure. Rudy Gobert will have to impose his power in painting, while the Duo Donte Divincenzo-Nickeil Alexander-Walker will have a key role at the end of the bench to maintain the hope of a return to this series.

programme.title: NBA Extra
programme.desc: All the news of the NBA, the results of the night and the top 10. NBA Extra is the unmissable event for basketball fans offered Monday to Friday at 12:45 p.m. on BeIN Sports. The team made up of Mary Patrux, Xavier Vaution, Rémi Reverchon, Jacques Monclar, Eric Micoud and Chris Singleton deciphers NBA news.

programme.title: Paris-SG / Reims
programme.desc: Relive the French male cup match.

programme.title: Be United
programme.desc: The Bein Sports Be united show gives the floor to sports enthusiasts who do not often have the floor, like people with disabilities.

programme.title: Real Madrid / Real Sociedad
programme.desc: Clap at the end of the Bernabéu. Without stake in the rankings, this Real Madrid - Real Sociedad will have the air of celebration and emotion, marked by the farewells of Carlo Ancelotti and Luka Modric in front of their audience. A last meeting loaded with symbols for the Merengue, already turned upon after. For his last dance at home, Luka Modrid, 28 trophies won, including six Champions Leagues, will be keen to shine one last time. By his side, Kylian Mbappé, in search of a 42nd goal this season, aims at the Golden Soulier to close a first Majuscule Madrid year. But Real Sociedad intends to play the spoilsports. Led by Inspired Takefusa Kubo (7 goals, 4 assists) and the experienced Mikel Oyarzabal, the Basque team dreams of a last feat. A success to salute the farewells of Imanol Alguacil and end the exercise on a blow in the Spanish capital.

programme.title: Metz / Reims
programme.desc: Huge loser of the last day of Ligue 1 with a barragist place obtained in the last seconds, the Stade de Reims must now go through a burning dam against FC Metz, euphoric after a season completed in League 2. Despite the disillusionment, the Rémois have solid arguments. Keito Nakamura, detonator on his left wing with 11 goals and 2 assists, remains a constant threat. In the axis, Valentin Atangana embodies the engine of the Samba Diawara system, while Yehvann Diouf continues to chain XXL performance in the cages. But Metz advances without complex. Gauthier Hein, master of playing grenats with 12 goals and 6 assists, is the symbol of this team with full confidence. On the wings, Matthieu Udol is delighted with his millimeter centers and Cheickh Tidiane Sabaly, serial scorer of the return phase (15 goals), could well tip this duel. The first leg promises to be explosive at Stade Saint-Symphorien.

programme.desc: Find our experts on the teams before the start of the meetings. With analyzes, comments and interviews, this magazine makes you discover everything that is important before a football match.

programme.title: Football: After-match
programme.desc: Find the after-match of Ligue 2 day, with our consultants around the set. Between interviews, press conference and debates, the post-match team will revive this day.

programme.title: By hand
programme.desc: The blue handballers went through all the emotions during the 2025 World Cup. In the hand, Renan Chedotal and Bein Sports discover as close as possible to the French male handball team. From the goal in extremis of Luka Karabatic, the chills of the half to the Zagreb Arena or the match for bronze full of twists and turns, return to the epic of January 2025.

programme.desc: Retransmission of the State of Origin, a rugby competition in XIII.

programme.title: New South Wales / Queensland Maroons
programme.desc: Retransmission of the State of Origin Female, a rugby competition in XIII. Two Australian teams, representing two Australian rival states, the New South Wales for New South Wales and Queensland Maroons for Queensland, find themselves for a series of three games. The players are selected according to the state they played their first professional match.

programme.title: It happens on beIN SPORTS
programme.desc: It happens on Bein Sports is a condensed of sports news, results and best images of the last days: football, tennis, basketball, rugby, handball or US sports (NBA, MLB, NFL), all competitions are reviewed.

programme.title: Gérone / Atlético Madrid
programme.desc: Relegated once again behind the untouchable duo Barça - Real, Atlético de Madrid aims for a high outing to validate its 3rd place in Liga. Last challenge: a trip to Girona, already saved, but determined to finish the exercise on a good note in front of its audience in Montilivi. Worn by a Julián Álvarez on fire, author of a bright double against Betis, a solid tricolor hinge formed by Robin Le Normand and Clément Lenglet, and a Giuliano Simeone struggling on his right flank, the Colchoneros have arms to finish the season in free wheel but with seriousness. Opposite, the Catalans have nothing to lose and count on the science of the goal of Cristhian Staani (11 achievements), the accelerations of Arnaut Danjuma and the vision of the game of the conductor Viktor Tsygankov to create the surprise and offer a last thrill to their supporters.

programme.title: Cleveland Guardians / Los Angeles Dodgers
programme.desc: Relive the major American Baseball Major League match.

programme.title: Crystal Palace / Manchester City
programme.desc: With the Premier League flight and Europe left too early, Manchester City has only one goal: to win the FA Cup to save its season. Opposed to Crystal Palace in the final in Wembley, the Skyblues approach this meeting as a final chance of avoiding the humiliation of an exercise without a major title. Under the leadership of a Kevin de Bruyne ready to bow by offering a last trophy at the club, of an Erling Haaland revanchard after weeks far from the field, and an Omar Marmoush in full success since his arrival (6 goals in 14 games), City has weapons to impose his law. But Palace, in search of the first title in its history, has nothing to lose. Surfing on the sparkling form of Eberechi Eze (5 goals in 4 games), the flashes of Ismaïla Sarr and the physical impact of Jean-Philippe Mateta, the Eagles dream of a feat in Wembley. Faced with a pressure City, all hopes are allowed for Londoners.

programme.title: Northampton Saints / Bordeaux-Bègles
programme.desc: A finalist for the first time in its history after having overlooked the Toulouse title holder (35-18), the Union Bordeaux-Bègles is preparing to challenge Northampton in the Champions Cup final, with the ambition to register its name at the top of European rugby. Led by a Damian Penaud back at 100 % and already author of 12 trials in the competition, a Lucu-Jalibert hinge in total master's degree, an elusive Louis Bielle-Biarrey on his wing and a Depoortere-Moefana duo as solid as complementary to the center, the UBB has serious arguments to write a golden page of its history. But opposite, the saints of Northampton do not come as victims. Winners of the Leinster's courage in the semi-finals (37-34), the English bet on the vista of the young English prodigy, Henry Pollock, the end Smith's end at the opening and return of George Furbank to the rear to win a second European title. A final of fire in perspective at the Principality Stadium of Cardiff.

programme.title: Clermont Foot / Boulogne-sur-Mer
programme.desc: Authoritarian winner to go to the lawn of Boulogne-sur-Mer (1-3), the CF63 addresses this dam back in an ideal position to validate its maintenance in Ligue 2.. In front of their audience of the Gabriel-Montpied stadium, the men of Sébastien Mazeyrat want to finish the work and definitively turn the page of a trying season. But beware of relaxation in the face of northerners sentenced to feat, and who have nothing to lose. In great shape, the Auvergnats rely on an inspired Henri Saivet, author of two assists on the outward journey, a Famara Diedhiou on fire with 4 goals on her last 4 outings, and an untenable Ousmane Diop on his right side to tip the scales. But Boulogne has not yet returned arms. To create the feat, visitors are counting on the realism of Thibault Rambaud (11 goals in National), the Flair of Théo Epailly, already goalscorer, and the licked technique of Jean Vercruysse to overthrow the steam. An almost impossible mission, but football reserves PA ...

programme.desc: This is Paris is the magazine dedicated to all the news in Paris Saint-Germain: last news from the changing rooms, reports and interviews of those who make the club, everything is reviewed as well as the last results and the next deadlines to come.

programme.title: Regular season - New York Mets / Los Angeles Dodgers
programme.desc: Discover the MAJOR LEAGUE BASEBAL (MLB) events. It brings together two leagues: the National League and the American League. The competition it organizes is the highest level in baseball in the United States. The regular season takes place from April to the end of September, then follow the qualifying phases that take the winners of each League to the World Series, which is the final playing the best of the 7 rounds.

programme.title: Finale. Liudmila Samsonova / Elena Rybakina
programme.desc: Prestige final in Strasbourg between two members of the Top 20 WTA. Elena Rybakina and Liudmila Samsonova compete to win their first WTA 500 title of the season in an explosive duel on the eve of Roland-Garros. Selected head n ° 4, the Kazakhstani had to draw on its resources to overcome Beatriz Haddad Maia in the semi-finals after 2:46 am of combat (7-6, 1-6, 6-2). Already a finalist here in 2020, the winner of Wimbledon 2022 finally dreams of lifting the Alsatian trophy and enriching an already high track record. In front, Liudmila Samsonova found fire after a complicated spring on earth. Eliminated from the entrance to Rome and Stuttgart, the Russian relaunched itself in Strasbourg, spreading blow Paula Badosa and Danielle Collins without trembling. It will aim for a sixth coronation in a career. A balanced poster between the power of Rybakina and the sharp regularity of Samsonova.

programme.title: Salon VIP
programme.desc: In the BeIN Sports VIP show, Claire Arnoux welcomes a guest, sports or not, who shares her passion for sport. In a relaxed atmosphere, the latest news from sports news went aside, as well as the outstanding results of previous days.

programme.title: Plan-of-Cuques / Dijon
programme.desc: beIN SPORTS, the largest of the shows

programme.title: Indiana Pacers / New York Knicks
programme.desc: Heroic in Game 4 by overthrowing 20 points behind to equalize in the series (100-106), the Knicks tackle this game 5 with the clear ambition to resume the advantage against Indiana. A new victory at the Gainbridge Fieldhouse would offer men from Tom Thibodeau a golden opportunity to return to a force at home. Worn by a decisive Karl-Anthony Towns in the Money Time (20 of his 24 points in the last quarter), a Jalen Brunson always as masterful at La Conde, and a duo Og Anunoby-Mikal Bridges collectively, the Knicks seem armed to respond in this capital turning point in the series. But the Pacers did not say their last word. At home, Indiana hopes to revive by relying on the address of Tyrese Haliburton, the experience of the 2019 champion Pascal Siakam and the interior impact of Myles Turner. A success would allow them to resume the psychological ascendant and to offer two match balls to win a place in the NBA final.

programme.title: Oklahoma City Thunder / Minnesota Timberwolves
programme.desc: By barely winning in Minneapolis during an unbreakable game 4 (128-126), the Thunder took control of the series (3-1) and can validate its ticket for the NBA finals in front of a boiling Paycc Center. A clear mission: to conclude at home and avoid a perilous return to Minnesota. Worn by a Shai Gilgeous-Alexander Imperial (40 pts, 10 assists), an unleashed Jalen Williams (34 pts, career record in playoffs) and an impassable Chet Holmgren in the racket, the men of Mark Daigneault have all the lights to strike a big blow. But beware of the Timberwolves start. Anthony Edwards, unrecognizable in Game 4 (16 pts), will have to find his edge to extend the adventure. Rudy Gobert will have to impose his power in painting, while the Duo Donte Divincenzo-Nickeil Alexander-Walker will have a key role at the end of the bench to maintain the hope of a return to this series.

programme.title: NBA Extra
programme.desc: All the news of the NBA, the results of the night and the top 10. NBA Extra is the unmissable event for basketball fans offered Monday to Friday at 12:45 p.m. on BeIN Sports. The team made up of Mary Patrux, Xavier Vaution, Rémi Reverchon, Jacques Monclar, Eric Micoud and Chris Singleton deciphers NBA news.

programme.title: Bath / Lyon
programme.desc: Two years after their triumph in Marseille, the Lyonnais find a CUP challenge final with the ambition to enrich their European list. Faced with them, a heavyweight of English rugby: Bath, the current leader of Premières, which aims a resounding double CUP Challenge - Premiership. The Lou advances with serious arguments. Davit Niniashvili, a X factor capable of blowing up any defense, a Bendeu hinge-Couilloud perfectly oiled, a Camille Cat back as heel holder, without forgetting a second Guillard line-William Impressive in the semi-finals against Racing 92. Despite a sawtooth season, the Rhodanians seem ready to strike a big blow to Cardiff. But Bath arrives launched. With the duo Charlie Ewels - Quinn Roux in spearhead of the pack, the Vista of Captain Ben Spencer at the melee and the magic of Finn Russell at the opening, the English intend to conclude their formidable season with a continental title. Duel of styles in sight, with a Euro trophy ...

programme.desc: Retransmission of the State of Origin Female, a rugby competition in XIII. The players are selected according to the state they played their first professional match.

programme.title: In the rhythm of freedom - season 1

The eight -episode documentary series talks about these immortal concerts - about preparations, backstage, course and social background.

The eight -episode documentary series talks about these immortal concerts - about preparations, backstage, course and social background.

GENERATION xG - MON 26 MAY
programme.desc: A deep dive into the tactical trends and statistical insights of modern football with input from players, managers and data experts from the 'fanalyst' community. This programme will analyse the on-field action in forensic detail and give hard core Premier League fans a new insight into what is happening on the pitch and why.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW
programme.desc: All the very best of the week's programming and digital content from another action-packed Premier League match round.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: We dive into the fiercest rivalry in English football-Manchester United and Liverpool. As Liverpool draw level with United's record haul of top-flight titles, this is a story of history, pride, and the relentless pursuit of greatness. With insight from icons on both sides-Ian Rush, Lou Macari, Brian Kidd, Michael Owen, Phil Thompson, and new Liverpool boss Arne Slot, we unpack the moments that have defined generations, split families, and lit up the Premier League.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS
programme.desc: Steve McManaman revisits ten standout moments from his Premier League career, from his breakthrough at Anfield to unforgettable solo goals and Merseyside derby magic. With flair, humour and personal insight, PL Moments takes you inside the story of one of the Premier League's most creative and entertaining players.

As Liverpool draw level with United's record haul of top-flight titles, this is a story of history, pride, and the relentless pursuit of greatness. With insight from icons on both sides-Ian Rush, Lou Macari, Brian Kidd, Michael Owen, Phil Thompson, and new Liverpool boss Arne Slot, we unpack the moments that have defined generations, split families, and lit up the Premier League.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW
programme.desc: With the remnants of the celebratory confetti barely gone from the Anfield pitch, Curtis Jones joins the Big Interview to reflect on an historic title-winning season. Having signed for his beloved team at just 9 years of age, the Liverpool born and bred midfielder explains just how much the title triumph means to him and sheds light on the impact of Arne Slot and the differences in approach of his new manager compared to Jurgen Klopp.

programme.title: PL MASTERCLASS

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: We dive into the fiercest rivalry in English football-Manchester United and Liverpool. As Liverpool draw level with United's record haul of top-flight titles, this is a story of history, pride, and the relentless pursuit of greatness. With insight from icons on both sides-Ian Rush, Lou Macari, Brian Kidd, Michael Owen, Phil Thompson, and new Liverpool boss Arne Slot, we unpack the moments that have defined generations, split families, and lit up the Premier League.
